scope.target: miscellaneous promotional and special-case parent/child completeness

candidates.name: Ancient Mew
candidates.notes: Externally documented as a Miscellaneous Promotional card. Grookai governs this under misc/Miscellaneous Cards & Products with a cosmos child printing.

candidates.name: Meowth
candidates.notes: High-signal miscellaneous reprint candidate; needs a second independent source before parent insertion.

candidates.name: Hoppip
candidates.notes: Japanese-card-back English-side promo candidate; requires identity modifier governance before insert.

candidates.name: Pichu
candidates.notes: Japanese-card-back English-side promo candidate. The stale #22 holo model was rejected; source-backed lane is #58 normal.

candidates.name: Pikachu
candidates.notes: Known E3-stamped Base Pikachu lane; this audit verifies both parent and child row presence.

candidates.name: Rapidash
candidates.notes: Pokemon Center NY stamped Wizards promo lane.

candidates.name: Ho-oh
candidates.notes: Pokemon Center NY stamped Wizards promo lane.

candidates.name: Charmander
candidates.notes: Championship-stamped special case; parent may exist without a child printing.

candidates.name: Charmeleon
candidates.notes: Championship-stamped special case; parent may exist without a child printing.

candidates.name: Charizard
candidates.notes: Championship-stamped special case; parent may exist without a child printing.

recommended_next_steps: Treat Ancient Mew, Meowth Gold Border, and E3 Japanese-back Hoppip/Pichu as applied only when live DB status is present_with_expected_child_printing.
Build a child-printing readiness package for already-present special/stamped parents with zero child rows, starting with high-signal families and exact finish evidence.
Keep jumbo-only items deprioritized unless collector policy changes.
